name: Cross-Border Referral

name: Send Money to China
description: Sending Money to China — Every Method Compared Honestly. AI-optimized corridor content hub with interactive cost charts, hidden FX calculator, provider rankings by use case, and compliance guides.

name: Supplier Pay Link
description: Supplier Pay Link — payment request concept for supplier-initiated cross-border payments. Multi-step flow: email/WhatsApp entry, buyer setup, supplier trust verification, payment method selection.

description: China Sourcing Navigator v2 — Next.js 16 static site with city deep dives, product category guides, and Canton Fair content.

description: The Payment Gap After Alibaba — blog landing page exploring how WorldFirst solves supplier payment challenges beyond Alibaba.

name: WorldFirst MCP Server
description: MCP server for WorldFirst cross-border payment APIs — FX quotes, supplier payments, beneficiary verification for AI agents.

name: WF Express Portal
description: WorldFirst Express — drop an idea and get ranked content directions instantly. Internal content ideation tool deployed on Vercel.

name: WForge Showcase
description: WFORGE — 9 AI Agents That Build Campaign Sites. Shows how WorldFirst uses Claude Code to orchestrate specialized agents for campaign site creation.

name: FX Landing Page
description: WorldFirst FX campaign landing page — foreign exchange product showcase for cross-border sellers.

name: Canton Fair Booth
description: Interactive 16:9 TV display for WorldFirst booth at Canton Fair 2026 — city carousel + Guangzhou sourcing guide.

name: WF Three Bets
description: WorldFirst Three Bets — strategic campaign site for key business initiatives.

name: Factory Stories
description: Factory Stories — real supplier stories from Chinese factories, bringing the sourcing journey to life.

description: China Sourcing Navigator — interactive sourcing guide covering major manufacturing cities, suppliers, and logistics across China.

name: WorldFirst Aqua
description: WorldFirst Aqua — Artisan Aquarium Filtration Shop. Demo e-commerce campaign site built with WForge.
